collectiondata.overview:
Beyond Dreams: Explore the Extraordinary Under 2,50,000 with Travelxploria

Imagine a journey where the sun rises over vast golden savannahs, and by nightfall, you’re sipping fine wine beneath the twinkling lights of a centuries-old European city. Picture pristine islands where turquoise waves kiss powdery beaches, or wild landscapes where ancient mountains meet endless skies. With Travelxploria’s curated experiences under 2,50,000, the world’s most enchanting corners are no longer distant dreams but your next destination.

Travelxploria—your trusted Best Travel Agency and celebrated Best International Tour Operator—crafts journeys that weave together culture, comfort, and discovery. Every itinerary is a carefully designed story, inviting you to lose yourself in vibrant markets, historic alleys, breathtaking safaris, and serene island retreats. Whether it’s the thrill of witnessing Africa’s majestic wildlife up close, the charm of cobblestone streets echoing with history, or the soothing calm of tropical lagoons, each moment is infused with magic.

Our Best Tour Operator expertise ensures your trip blends luxury and authenticity, from boutique hotels nestled in heritage neighborhoods to exclusive beach villas surrounded by swaying palms. Each experience is curated to engage your senses and enrich your spirit, whether it’s a private sunset cruise, a guided art tour, or an intimate dinner under starlit skies.

For those embarking on new beginnings, our Best Honeymoon Planner creates escapes filled with romance and elegance—secluded beaches, cozy mountain hideaways, and unforgettable moments designed just for two. Families benefit from our Best Family Package options, combining adventure and relaxation so every generation finds joy—from wildlife safaris and cultural excursions to beachside fun and urban explorations.

Travelxploria’s commitment to quality means every detail is handled seamlessly—transfers, guides, and accommodations—so you can focus on what truly matters: soaking in the beauty, culture, and wonder of your journey.

With Travelxploria, traveling under 2,50,000 doesn’t mean sacrificing dreams—it means unlocking them. The world is waiting—beyond the horizon, beyond expectations, and perfectly within reach.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Morocco with airport transfer, hotel check-in, and welcome dinner.
  • Guided city tour of Casablanca including Hassan II Mosque; scenic drive to Marrakech with a carriage ride to Jemaa el-Fnaa.
  • Full-day guided city tour exploring Marrakech’s historic highlights and evening folklore dinner show (optional).
  • Journey through the Atlas Mountains with stops at Ait Benhaddou and Ouarzazate before reaching Boumalne Dades.
  • Explore Todgha Gorge and Ksar el Khorbat before arriving in the desert town of Erfoud for optional dune excursion.
  • Scenic drive through the Atlas Mountains with stops in Midelt, Azrou, and Bhalil, ending in Fez with dinner.
  • Guided city tour of Fez followed by a scenic drive north through the Rif valleys to Tangier.
  • Free time in Tangier, visit the seaside town of Asilah, then continue to Rabat for the night.
  • Morning city tour of Rabat and short drive to Casablanca for a relaxed final afternoon.
  • Breakfast and end of the journey with fond memories and Travelxploria assistance for departure.

This morning, join our TravelXploria representative for a guided tour of Casablanca, Morocco’s largest city and economic hub. We’ll explore the grand boulevards, admire the charm of Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish architecture, and palm-lined avenues, and stroll through the Arab League Park and the quaint little Medina. A highlight of the tour is the visit to the iconic Hassan II Mosque, perched by the sea with its towering 210-meter minaret. After the tour, enjoy free time for lunch at La Corniche. At 3:30 p.m., we depart for Marrakech, arriving by 6:45 p.m. Enjoy a horse-drawn carriage ride and dinner.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Casablanca","to":"Marrakesh","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1655,"h_name":"Grand Mogador Menara","h_country":"Morocco","h_city":"Marrakesh","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714176-Grand Mogador Menara.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714308-Grand Mogador Menara1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Marrakesh/Grand Mogador Menara/1747474714356-Grand Mogador Menara2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Marrakech City Tour","day_summary":"

At 08:15 a.m., our Travelxploria representative will accompany you on a guided city tour of Marrakech, a vibrant city surrounded by ochre walls and dotted with palm trees. We’ll explore the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa square, wander through the colorful Medina, and admire the stunning Koutoubia Mosque. The tour also includes a visit to the beautiful Bahia Palace (entry included), showcasing traditional Moroccan architecture. Lunch will be served at the hotel, and the afternoon is yours to relax or explore at your leisure. In the evening, we suggest attending the Fantasy dinner show to experience Morocco’s diverse and enchanting folkloric traditions.


","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"BOUMALNE DADES","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929881-AdobeStock_140643598.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929521-AdobeStock_66157969.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929726-AdobeStock_131049519.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062930036-AdobeStock_140643735.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Marrakech - Ait Benhaddou - Ourzazate - Boumalne Dades","day_summary":"

At 08:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Marrakech and journey through the breathtaking Atlas Mountains, the natural divide between the city and the Sahara Desert. Along the way, we’ll stop at a charming mountain village. By 01:30 p.m., we’ll reach Ait Benhaddou, a UNESCO World Heritage site famed for its scenic mud-brick architecture featured in many films. After lunch and a stroll, we’ll continue to Ouarzazate at 03:30 p.m., another historic desert city. At 04:30 p.m., we travel onward through arid plains and oasis valleys, arriving in Boumalne Dades at 06:00 p.m. for dinner and overnight. Note: Route may change due to weather.

We’ll depart Boumalne Dades at 07:15 a.m., embarking on a scenic journey through the Valley of the Kasbahs, a region rich in history and lined with traditional adobe fortresses. Along the way, admire oases, palm groves, and charming Berber villages. At 09:00 a.m., we’ll arrive at the majestic Todgha Gorge for a short exploration. By 10:45 a.m., we’ll stop at Ksar el Khorbat, a fortified desert village supported by the Europamundo Foundation. After departing at 11:45 a.m., we’ll reach Erfoud at 02:00 p.m. for lunch and relaxation. An optional sunset off-road excursion to Merzouga’s sand dunes is available with dinner.

We begin our journey from Erfoud at 08:00 a.m., crossing the majestic Atlas Mountains and scenic gorges, passing through a high plateau where nomadic shepherds dwell. At 11:30 a.m., we pause in Midelt for a brief walk. After departing at 12:00 p.m., we stop for an included lunch beside a serene mountain lake. The landscape then transforms into dense forests. At 03:15 p.m., we visit Azrou’s “House of Cedars” and observe native monkeys. After a 05:15 p.m. stop in the cave-dwelling town of Bhalil, we reach Fez by 06:45 p.m., admiring panoramic city views from the Marinid Tombs before dinner.

At 08:00 a.m., we depart the hotel for a guided city tour of Fez, Morocco’s cultural capital. We'll explore its iconic landmarks, including the Royal Palace’s Bronze Gates, the Jewish Quarter, the Tanners’ Quarter, and the lively souks. The highlight is the ancient Medina, rich in Arabian heritage. A traditional Moroccan lunch will be served in a beautifully restored palace within the Medina (included). At 03:00 p.m., we leave Fez, journeying north through the scenic Rif valleys, filled with olive groves and fruit fields. By 08:00 p.m., we arrive in Tangier, where dinner will be provided and included in the package.

We’ll begin the day with some free time to explore Tangier at your leisure. Later, we head south to the coastal gem of Asilah, a beautifully preserved walled city once known as a pirate haven. Today, it enchants visitors with its whitewashed buildings, ocean views, and artistic flair. You’ll have time to stroll its charming streets and enjoy lunch at your own pace (your guide will share details). At 4:30 p.m., we depart Asilah, traveling along the motorway to Rabat, Morocco’s diplomatic capital. By 7:30 p.m., we arrive in Rabat, where dinner and comfortable overnight accommodation will be provided.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll start a panoramic tour of Morocco’s capital, Rabat, known for its stunning beauty. Key sights include the impressive Oudayas Fortress, the iconic Hassan Tower and King Mohammed V’s mausoleum, the historic Andalusian Walls, the exterior of the Royal Palace, and the modern embassy districts. After the guided tour, you’ll have some free time to explore the city at your own pace. We’ll depart Rabat at 11:00 a.m. and arrive in Casablanca by 12:15 p.m., leaving the afternoon free for last-minute shopping and personal activities.

After breakfast, our unforgettable journey comes to a close, leaving you with lasting memories of Morocco’s beauty and culture. Our TravelXploria representative will be there to assist you with your departure arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable farewell. We hope this experience has inspired you and look forward to welcoming you on your next adventure with TravelXploria.

packages.overview:
• Tangier – Arrival in Tangier, hotel transfer, and dinner with evening briefing by Travelxploria representative.
  • Tangier – Asilah – Rabat – Morning free time in Tangier, visit charming Asilah, and arrive in the capital, Rabat, for dinner and overnight.
  • Rabat – Casablanca – El Jadida – Safi – Explore Rabat, tour Casablanca, visit historic El Jadida, and overnight in coastal Safi.
  • Safi – Essaouira – Taghazout – Agadir – Discover Safi ceramics, stroll through Essaouira’s medina, stop at Taghazout, and reach Agadir for dinner.
  • Agadir – Marrakech – Morning free at Agadir beach, then journey through the Atlas Mountains to lively Marrakech with evening Kalesa ride.
  • Marrakech – Guided tour of Marrakech’s highlights, including Bahia Palace and Jemaa el-Fnaa square; enjoy lunch and afternoon free.
  • Marrakech – Ouzoud – Fez – Scenic drive to Ouzoud Falls with lunch and boat ride, then continue through diverse landscapes to Fez.
  • Fez – Tangier – Explore Fez’s cultural treasures and medina, then journey north through the Rif to return to Tangier.
  • Tangier – Departure – After breakfast, end of tour with memories of a rich Moroccan journey; Travelxploria support until departure.​

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll begin our city tour of Rabat, the beautiful capital of Morocco. Highlights include the fortress of the Oudaia, Hassan Tower with King Mohamed V’s mausoleum, the Andalusian walls, the Royal Palace’s outer enclosure, and the modern embassy quarters. After free time, we’ll depart at noon for Casablanca, arriving at 1:15 p.m. There, we’ll enjoy a short tour including an external visit to the grand Hassan II Mosque and a lunch stop at the Corniche. At 4:00 p.m., we’ll arrive in El Jadida, a UNESCO site with Portuguese heritage. After exploring, we depart for Safi, arriving by 8:00 p.m. for dinner.

At 8:30 a.m., we’ll explore Safi, famous for its vibrant ceramics. We’ll visit the Castle of the Sea, admire the fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and explore the Hill of the Potters with its many shops. At 10:00 a.m., we depart for Essaouira, the “Blue Pearl of the Atlantic.” This historic city with stunning beaches and a UNESCO-listed walled Medina offers free time for lunch and exploration. At 3:00 p.m., we continue along the Atlantic coast to Taghazout, a quaint fishing and surf town. By 7:30 p.m., we arrive in Agadir, where dinner is included.

Enjoy a free morning in Morocco’s most popular beach destination, Agadir. Relax on its endless sandy beaches, take a leisurely stroll along the scenic seafront, or explore the many shops and retail areas. At 2:30 p.m., after lunch, we’ll depart from Agadir and journey along the picturesque highway crossing the Atlas Mountains. By 6:00 p.m., we’ll arrive in Marrakech. After hotel check-in, enjoy a traditional Kalesa ride to the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa square, renowned for its vibrant, nonstop atmosphere. Note: In case of rain or cold weather, we may leave Agadir earlier, around 10:30 a.m., to reach Marrakech by lunch.

At 8:15 a.m., we’ll start our exciting city tour of Marrakech, an exotic city surrounded by ochre walls and hundreds of palm trees, buzzing with life and activity. We’ll explore the impressive city walls, the vibrant Jemaa el-Fnaa square, the colorful Medina, and visit the iconic Koutoubia Mosque. Our tour also includes a visit to the beautiful Bahia Palace (tickets included). Afterward, enjoy lunch at the hotel followed by free time to relax or explore on your own. In the evening, we highly recommend attending the Fantasy dinner show to experience Morocco’s rich and diverse folklore.

At 8:00 a.m., we depart from Marrakech for a longer journey showcasing Morocco’s diverse landscapes, traveling along the Atlantic slope of the Atlas Mountains. At 11:00 a.m., we’ll stop at the serene Ouzoud Falls, North Africa’s highest waterfalls at 110 meters, nestled in the Middle Atlas surrounded by stunning gorges. Enjoy a short boat trip and lunch at a restaurant with beautiful waterfall views (both included). You can also observe the local macaques (Moroccan monkeys). At 1:30 p.m., we continue our journey to Fez, arriving at 7:45 p.m. Before hotel check-in, we’ll admire the city view from the Marinid Tombs. Dinner is included.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from the hotel to begin a guided city tour of Fez, exploring its iconic architecture and lively souks. We’ll enter through the Bronze Gates of the Royal Palace, visit the Jewish Quarter, the Tanners’ Quarter, and experience the vibrant markets. Known as Morocco’s cultural capital, Fez’s Medina retains its traditional Arabian charm. After the tour, enjoy a typical Moroccan lunch in a beautiful old palace within the Medina (included). At 3:00 p.m., we’ll leave Fez and travel north along the modern highway through the lush Rif valleys. Arrival in Tangier is at 8:00 p.m., with dinner included.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival in Marrakech, transfer to hotel, evening visit to Jemaa el-Fnaa square by caleche.
  •  Guided city tour of Marrakech including Medina, Bahia Palace, and free afternoon.
  • Travel across Atlas Mountains via Ait Benhaddou and Ouarzazate to Boumalne Dades.
  •  Explore the Valley of the Kasbahs, Todgha Gorge, Ksar el Khorbat, and relax in Erfoud.
  • Journey through Middle Atlas with stops in Midelt, Azrou, Bhalil, ending in Fez.
  •  Visit Fez Medina, Roman ruins at Volubilis, holy Moulay Idriss, then Meknes.
  •  Morning in Meknes, city tour of Rabat, arrive in Casablanca for dinner.
  •  Casablanca city tour including Hassan II Mosque, then return to Marrakech.
  • Departure day with luggage storage option and last-minute city exploration.​

Welcome to Morocco! Upon arrival in Marrakech, you will be transferred to your hotel where you can enjoy some free time to relax and settle in. At 6:00 p.m., join us for a charming Caleche ride through the city, taking you to the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, which will be buzzing with vibrant energy and local culture at this hour. After soaking in the sights and sounds, we’ll return to the hotel for a delicious dinner and comfortable accommodation. Throughout your stay, a TravelXploria representative will be available to assist you and ensure a seamless experience.

At 08:00 a.m., we depart Marrakech and begin a scenic journey through the majestic Atlas Mountains, a stunning natural divide between the city and the Sahara Desert. En route, we’ll stop in a charming mountain village for a brief break. By 01:30 p.m., we reach Ait Benhaddou, a UNESCO World Heritage site famed for its captivating adobe architecture featured in many films. After lunch and a relaxed stroll, we depart at 03:00 p.m. for Ouarzazate, arriving at 03:30 p.m. to explore its historic fortress. At 04:30 p.m., we continue through desert landscapes to Boumalne Dades. Arrival by 06:00 p.m. for dinner and overnight stay.

At 07:15 a.m., we depart Boumalne Dades and travel through the scenic Valley of the Kasbahs, known for its historic adobe fortresses nestled between the High and Saharan Atlas. Along the way, we’ll admire lush oases, palm groves, and charming villages. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Todgha Gorge to explore its towering canyon walls—one of Morocco’s most breathtaking natural wonders. After a short visit, we continue toward Ksar el Khorbat, an adobe village supported by the Europamundo Foundation. At 02:00 p.m., we reach Erfoud for lunch and relaxation. Optional dune excursion in Merzouga offers sunset views and dinner in the desert.

We begin our journey from Erfoud at 08:00 a.m., crossing the scenic Atlas Mountains through dramatic gorges and a high plateau inhabited by nomadic shepherds. At 11:30 a.m., we stop in Midelt for a short walk in this town known for apple farming and stone crafts. After departing at 12:00 p.m., we enjoy lunch by a peaceful lake amid the stunning Middle Atlas landscape. By 03:15 p.m., we reach Azrou to visit the House of Cedars and see native monkeys. At 05:15 p.m., we explore Bhalil’s colorful, cave-integrated homes. Finally, at 06:45 p.m., we arrive in Fez and enjoy dinner.

In the morning, our Travelxploria representative will guide you through Fez, starting at the Royal Palace’s Bronze Gates. Explore the Jewish quarter, vibrant souks, and traditional tanneries. As Morocco’s cultural heart and home to the world’s oldest university, Fez boasts a fascinating Medina that captures authentic Arab heritage. Lunch will be served in a historic palace. At 3:00 p.m., we depart for Volubilis, a remarkable Roman archaeological site (entry included). At 5:45 p.m., we reach the sacred city of Moulay Idriss. After free time, we continue to Meknes, arriving at 7:30 p.m. for hotel check-in and a delightful dinner.

At 8:30 a.m., after breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will lead a guided tour of Meknes, a UNESCO World Heritage Site founded in the 11th century by the Almoravids. Once the capital under Sultan Muley Ismail, it boasts grand Spanish-Moorish architecture and towering gates like Bab el Mansur. We’ll visit El Hedim Square and the Mausoleum of Moulay Ismail (entry included), with free time to explore. At 12:30 p.m., we depart, stopping for lunch en route. Arriving in Rabat at 3:30 p.m., we’ll tour highlights including the Oudaia Kasbah, Hassan Tower, and Royal Palace. At 6:30 p.m., we continue to Casablanca. Dinner included.

This morning, join our Travelxploria representative for a guided tour of Casablanca, Morocco’s largest city and economic hub. We’ll explore Mohamed V Square, surrounded by grand Moorish architecture and vibrant fountains, and stroll through the palm-lined Arab League Park. You’ll also visit the charming Medina and enjoy entry to the stunning seaside Hassan II Mosque, famed for its 210-meter-high minaret with a laser beam pointing toward Mecca. After the tour, enjoy free time for lunch in the scenic La Corniche area. At 3:30 p.m., we depart for Marrakech, arriving by 6:45 p.m. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel included.

packages.overview:
• ​Marrakech: Arrival in Marrakech, transfer to hotel, and evening Caleche ride to the vibrant Jemaa el-Fnaa Square.
  • Marrakech: City tour exploring the Medina, Koutoubia Mosque, and Bahia Palace, with optional Fantasy dinner show in the evening.
  •  Marrakech to Boumalne Dades: Scenic drive through the Atlas Mountains with visits to Ait Benhaddou and Ouarzazate, ending in Boumalne Dades.
  • Boumalne Dades to Erfoud: Journey through Todgha Gorge and Khorbat, with optional desert excursion to Merzouga at sunset.
  • Erfoud to Fez: Cross the Atlas Mountains via Midelt, Azrou, and Bhalil before reaching the spiritual city of Fez.
  • Fez to Tangier: Guided tour of Fez's historic sites and souks, followed by travel through Rif valleys to Tangier.
  • Tangier to Rabat via Asilah: Free time in Tangier, lunch stop in the coastal town of Asilah, and arrival in Rabat.
  • Rabat to Marrakech via Casablanca: Panoramic tour of Rabat and Casablanca, including the Hassan II Mosque, before returning to Marrakech.
  • Departure from Marrakech: Tour concludes after breakfast with flexible luggage storage and optional late check-out.
    Let me know if you'd like this formatted into a travel brochure or document!

Welcome to Morocco! Upon arrival in Marrakech, you’ll be greeted by our Travelxploria representative and transferred to your hotel. Enjoy some free time to relax or begin exploring the city at your own pace. At 6:00 p.m., we’ll embark on a delightful Caleche ride to the lively Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, a cultural hub buzzing with energy. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel for dinner and accommodation. Please note that hotel check-in is typically at 2:00 p.m. If you arrive early, consider booking an extra night. For assistance, visit the information board or contact our representative listed at reception.

At 08:15 a.m., we’ll begin an immersive city tour of Marrakech, a vibrant oasis framed by palm trees and ochre-colored walls. Discover the charm of this lively city as we explore its impressive ancient ramparts, the iconic Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, the bustling Medina, and the majestic Koutoubia Mosque. We’ll also visit the beautiful Bahia Palace, with entrance tickets included. After the tour, enjoy a delicious lunch at the hotel, followed by a relaxed afternoon at your leisure. In the evening, we recommend attending the Fantasy Dinner Show, a spectacular event showcasing Morocco’s diverse and colorful cultural and folkloric traditions.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"BOUMALNE DADES","country":"Morocco","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929881-AdobeStock_140643598.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929521-AdobeStock_66157969.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062929726-AdobeStock_131049519.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Morocco/BOUMALNE DADES/1747062930036-AdobeStock_140643735.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Marrakech - Ait Benhaddou - Ourzazate - Boumalne Dades","day_summary":"

At 08:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Marrakech and begin our scenic journey through the majestic Atlas Mountains, a breathtaking natural barrier between the city and the Sahara. Along the way, we’ll stop at a picturesque mountain village for a brief break. By 01:30 p.m., we’ll arrive at Ait Benhaddou, a stunning UNESCO-listed adobe village featured in many famous films. Enjoy lunch and explore its charming mud-brick streets. At 03:00 p.m., we’ll continue to Ouarzazate, another historic city with a UNESCO-protected fortress. Afterward, we travel through serene desert plains and arrive at Boumalne Dades by 06:00 p.m. for dinner and overnight stay.

We begin our day at 07:15 a.m. from Boumalne Dades, traveling through the Valley of the Kasbahs, a region nestled between the High and Saharan Atlas, known for its many historic adobe fortresses. Along the way, we’ll pass scenic oases, lush palm groves, and charming villages. At 09:00 a.m., we reach the breathtaking Todgha Gorge, where you’ll have free time to explore. By 10:45 a.m., we visit Ksar el Khorbat, an oasis village supported by the Europamundo Foundation. At 02:00 p.m., we arrive in Erfoud for lunch and leisure. Optional sunset dune excursion with dinner in Merzouga is available.

We depart Erfoud at 08:00 a.m., crossing the Atlas Mountains through dramatic gorges and scenic highlands, passing nomadic shepherd communities. At 11:30 a.m., we pause in Midelt, known for its apples and mineral crafts—perfect for a short walk. Continuing through the Middle Atlas, we stop for an included lunch beside a serene mountain lake. The landscape shifts to dense forests where snow is common in winter. By 03:15 p.m., we arrive at Azrou’s House of Cedars, home to curious monkeys. At 05:15 p.m., we explore the cave dwellings of Bhalil, then reach Fez by 06:45 p.m. for dinner and rest.

At 08:00 a.m., we depart the hotel for a guided city tour of Fez, Morocco’s cultural heart. With our local expert, we’ll enter through the majestic Bronze Gates of the Royal Palace, explore the Jewish Quarter, the Tanners’ Quarter, and wander through the vibrant Medina and bustling souks, capturing the essence of traditional Arabian life. A delicious Moroccan lunch will be served in a historic palace inside the Medina (included). At 03:00 p.m., we journey north via the highway through the fertile Rif valleys, reaching Tangier by 08:00 p.m. Dinner and overnight stay included in this dynamic coastal city.

We begin the day with free time in Tangier to relax or explore at your leisure. Later in the morning, we’ll head south to the beautiful coastal town of Asilah, once a pirate stronghold, now a serene, white-walled city with artistic charm. Stroll through its quaint streets and enjoy lunch at your own pace—our Travelxploria representative will guide you on timing and recommendations. At 4:30 p.m., we depart for Rabat, Morocco’s diplomatic capital, traveling along a scenic motorway. Upon arrival at 7:30 p.m., we’ll settle into our hotel where dinner and overnight accommodation will be provided.

At 08:00 a.m., we begin a panoramic tour of Rabat, the elegant capital of Morocco. Guided by our Travelxploria representative, we’ll explore highlights such as the Kasbah of the Udayas, the Hassan Tower and Mausoleum of Mohammed V, the Andalusian walls, the exterior of the Royal Palace, and embassy-lined modern districts. After some free time, we depart at 12:00 p.m. for Casablanca, arriving at 1:15 p.m. for a brief tour, including the Hassan II Mosque’s exterior and lunch near the Corniche. At 3:30 p.m., we continue to Marrakech, arriving by 6:45 p.m., where dinner and accommodation await.

After breakfast, your unforgettable Moroccan journey with Travelxploria comes to a close, leaving you with cherished memories of this remarkable land. Please note that standard hotel check-out time is 10:00 a.m.. Should your departure be later, you may leave your luggage at the hotel reception and continue exploring the city freely, without the burden of your bags. packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia’s cultural capital.
  • Witness nature’s magic at the Phillip Island Penguin Parade.
  • Explore the breathtaking sights along the Great Ocean Road.
  • Depart Melbourne and head to your next adventure in Sydney.
  • Discover Sydney's top attractions with the Merlin Two Attraction Pass and Sydney Opera House Tour, then soar above the city on a thrilling helicopter flight.
  • Experience the stunning Blue Mountains at sunset.
  • Depart from Sydney and begin your island escape at Tangalooma.
  • Unwind at Tangalooma Island Resort amidst unspoiled natural beauty.
  • Enjoy the final moments on Tangalooma before heading to the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into the fun with theme park access and a magical hot air balloon ride.
  • Depart from the Gold Coast, taking cherished memories home with you.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Melbourne International Airport","to":"Melbourne","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1578,"h_name":"Mercure Melbourne Southbank","h_country":"Australia","h_city":"Melbourne","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Melbourne/Mercure Melbourne Southbank/1747317783351-Mercure Melbourne Southbank 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Melbourne/Mercure Melbourne Southbank/1747317783463-Mercure Melbourne Southbank 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Melbourne/Mercure Melbourne Southbank/1747317783646-Mercure Melbourne Southbank.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Phillip Island Penguin Parade Small Group Eco Tour by Go West Tours","day_summary":"

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Explore the city’s iconic landmarks including the MCG and Eureka Skydeck.
  • Discover Phillip Island’s wildlife and experience the magical Penguin Parade on a small group eco tour.
  • Journey along the scenic Great Ocean Road and marvel at Victoria’s spectacular coastline.
  • Depart Melbourne and travel to the vibrant coastal paradise of the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into fun with the Best of Both Worlds pass at Movie World and Sea World.
  • Soar above the hinterland on a hot air balloon ride, paired with a complimentary Arro Jet experience.
  • Bid farewell to Gold Coast and transfer to your next destination—Hamilton Island.
  • Enjoy a full-day Cruise Whitsundays tour to explore the marine wonders of the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Relax and explore Hamilton Island at your own pace with a leisurely free day.
  • Depart from Hamilton Island and head to the stunning harbour city of Sydney.
  • Use your Merlin Four Attraction Pass to discover Sydney’s top attractions and join a guided Opera House tour.
  • Witness the beauty of the Blue Mountains at sunset on an unforgettable full-day tour.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home the cherished memories of your incredible Australian journey.

[{"city":"Melbourne","country":"Australia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892745-AdobeStock_571879591.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892229-AdobeStock_122918061.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058891761-AdobeStock_14809750.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892054-AdobeStock_78014018.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892400-AdobeStock_123778075.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892573-AdobeStock_158368495.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Melbourne","day_summary":"

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free arrival in Melbourne with a comfortable transfer from the airport directly to your 4-star hotel located in the heart of the Central Business District, where a delicious breakfast is included as part of your stay.

Discover Melbourne's vibrant sporting culture with an immersive behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG), delving into its storied past and world-class facilities. During the one-hour tour, explore highlights such as the renowned MCC Long Room, the historic MCC Library (established in 1873), the MCG Tapestry, player change rooms, and the cricketers’ viewing room. Gain exclusive access to the Ron Casey Media Centre, admire the portraits of cricket legends Sir Donald Bradman and Sachin Tendulkar, and enjoy a rare walk on the arena itself. The tour also includes a visit to the Cricket Victoria Bill Lawry Centre, the Ponsford Stand, and the City Terrace, offering stunning panoramic views of Melbourne’s skyline.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park
Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes
Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Sydney – Welcome to the harbourfront city of iconic landmarks and global attractions.
  • Explore Sydney’s top attractions with the Merlin Four Attraction Pass and a guided Sydney Opera House tour.
  • Soar above Sydney on a thrilling helicopter ride and cruise to Taronga Zoo for a wild encounter.
  • Depart Sydney with a seamless transfer to the airport and head to the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into fun at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.​
  • Drift above the Gold Coast Hinterland on a hot air balloon ride with a complimentary Arro Jet experience.
  • Bid farewell to the Gold Coast with a shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Cairns and journey through the ancient rainforest via the Skyrail and Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Enjoy a full-day cruise to the breathtaking Green Island on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart Cairns with a smooth hotel-to-airport transfer for your flight to Melbourne.​
  • Embark on the scenic Great Ocean Road Tour and explore Victoria’s stunning coastline.
  • Witness the magical Penguin Parade on Phillip Island with a small group eco tour.
  • Conclude your Australian adventure and depart from Melbourne with sweet memories in tow.​

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

Discover Taronga Zoo, Sydney’s iconic wildlife sanctuary nestled on the picturesque Sydney Harbour, with the convenience of the Zoo Express package that includes a return ferry ride and zoo entry. Skip the hassle of buses by entering through the Lower Zoo Entrance near the wharf or enjoy a scenic public bus ride to the Main Entrance. From 9:00am daily, immerse yourself in a day of wildlife wonder, complete with engaging keeper presentations featuring seals, koalas, giraffes, and more—perfectly blending ease and adventure.

Soar above Sydney’s breathtaking landscape on an exhilarating 20-minute helicopter joy flight, offering unparalleled panoramic views of the city’s iconic landmarks. Begin your adventure with a warm welcome and safety briefing before taking to the skies, where you’ll capture unforgettable moments over Maroubra Beach, Coogee, and Bondi. Trace the eastern coastline, glide past Dover Heights and Vaucluse, and marvel at aerial views of the Sydney Harbour Bridge, Opera House, Taronga Zoo, Watsons Bay, and Manly Cove. With insightful commentary through Bose headsets, this scenic flight delivers the ultimate bird’s-eye perspective of Sydney, making for an unforgettable experience.

Day 4 marks your departure from the vibrant urban oasis of Sydney, as you enjoy a seamless shared transfer from your hotel to Sydney Airport, ensuring a smooth and stress-free start to the next leg of your journey.

Say goodbye to the hassle of navigating unfamiliar roads with a smooth, stress-free transfer from Brisbane Airport to the Gold Coast. Travel in comfort aboard a modern, air-conditioned vehicle that ensures a quick and convenient journey, allowing you to relax and focus on the exciting adventures that await at your destination.

Embark on a captivating nocturnal adventure through the mystical rainforest, illuminated by the soft glow of torchlight. Journey along scenic mountain roads with breathtaking views of the Scenic Rim and Gold Coast before delving into the rainforest’s hidden wonders. Discover the secrets of its nocturnal wildlife and be mesmerized by the stunning Curtis Falls. The highlight of the experience is witnessing the magical glow worms adorning the rock faces—an awe-inspiring natural spectacle unique to Australia’s east coast. Duration: Approx 4 hours, with pickup and drop-off from selected hotels or nearby points.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

Embark on an unforgettable full-day journey along Victoria’s iconic Great Ocean Road, just a short drive from Melbourne. Delight in the breathtaking views of the majestic Twelve Apostles, wander through charming coastal towns, and explore the rich history of landmarks like the stunning Loch Ard Gorge. Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

As you prepare to depart, take a moment to reflect on the cherished memories and incredible experiences you've gathered throughout your adventure Down Under. packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia's arts and cultural capital.
  • Discover stunning wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade tour.
  • Explore the iconic Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s scenic coastal wonders.
  • Depart Melbourne with a seamless shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in tropical Cairns and prepare for nature-filled adventures.
  • Journey through ancient rainforests via Skyrail & Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Cruise to Green Island for a full day on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart from Cairns with a smooth shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and dive into sun, surf, and excitement.
  • Enjoy Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds Pass.​
  • Depart Gold Coast with a comfortable shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a Big Bus hop-on hop-off pass and Merlin Attractions.
  • Embark on a full-day Blue Mountains adventure through nature and history.
  • Depart from Sydney, bringing home unforgettable memories of Australia.​

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Tokyo with a shared transfer to the hotel and free time to relax.
  • Explore Tokyo’s iconic landmarks on a guided city tour with lunch and dinner included.
  • Discover Kawaguchiko and ascend Mount Fuji, with a stay at a traditional Ryokan.
  • Visit a heritage village, scenic falls, Toyota Museum, and arrive in Kyoto.
  • Full-day tour of Kyoto's temples, shrines, bamboo forest, and vibrant Gion district.
  • Visit Nara’s giant Buddha, Horyuji Temple, and end the day exploring Osaka.
  • Tour Himeji Castle and Korakuen Garden with free time in Okayama.
  • Stroll through Kurashiki, visit Hiroshima’s memorials, and explore Miyajima Island.
  • Departure day with cherished memories of your Japanese journey.
4o

Welcome to Japan! Upon arrival and completion of customs formalities, a Travelxploria Representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel via a shared shuttle bus. Once you’ve checked in, the remainder of the day is yours to relax or explore the surroundings at your own pace. Later in the afternoon, our representative will provide you with all the necessary information and details regarding the exciting tour that awaits you in the coming days.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Haneda International Airport","to":"Tokyo","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1540,"h_name":"Shinagawa Prince Hotel","h_country":"Japan","h_city":"Tokyo","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318588-Shinagawa Prince Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318703-Shinagawa Prince Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Shinagawa Prince Hotel/1747227318705-Shinagawa Prince Hotel 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tokyo Guided City Tour","day_summary":"

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

At 8:00 a.m., we’ll depart from Kyoto and travel to Nara, arriving by 9:00 a.m. to visit the iconic Todaiji Temple, built in 752 and home to a majestic giant Buddha statue. Surrounded by a peaceful park with friendly, free-roaming deer, it’s a perfect spot for photos and reflection. At 10:30 a.m., we’ll head to Horyuji Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site with ancient wooden structures and deep spiritual heritage. After exploring, we’ll enjoy lunch before continuing to Osaka at 2:30 p.m. In the evening, we’ll visit Dotonbori, where you can experience its vibrant nightlife, neon lights, and delicious cuisine.

At 10:00 a.m., we’ll continue to Hiroshima, arriving around 12:30 p.m. to visit the Peace Memorial, Atomic Bomb Dome, and Peace Memorial Museum—sites commemorating the tragic events of 1945. After lunch, we’ll take a short ferry ride to the spiritual island of Miyajima to explore the iconic Itsukushima Shrine and its floating torii gate. At 7:00 p.m., we’ll return to Hiroshima by ferry, where a delicious dinner awaits before concluding the day.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Tokyo and enjoy a leisure day with airport transfer and tour briefing.
  • Explore Tokyo's iconic sites including Shibuya Crossing, Meiji Shrine, and Asakusa, with lunch and dinner included.
  • Visit Mount Fuji and Kawaguchiko, enjoy scenic views, a lake cruise, and a stay in a traditional Ryokan.
  • Explore a traditional village, admire Shiraito Falls, visit the Toyota Museum, and arrive in Kyoto.
  • Discover Kyoto’s famous landmarks including Arashiyama, Fushimi Inari Shrine, and Gion.
  • Travel through rural Japan visiting the historic village of Tsumago and Matsumoto Castle.
  • Visit Zenkoji Temple, see snow monkeys, stroll Kusatsu spa town, and stay in a Ryokan.
  • Explore Nikko’s shrines and scenic abyss before returning to Tokyo.
  • Departure after breakfast with memories of a remarkable Japanese journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Haneda International Airport","to":"Tokyo","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":1541,"h_name":"Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho","h_country":"Japan","h_city":"Tokyo","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho/1747227448092-Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho/1747227448170-Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Tokyo/Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho/1747227448208-Moxy Tokyo Kinshicho 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tokyo Guided City Tour","day_summary":"

This morning, embark on an extensive guided tour of Tokyo, lasting approximately five hours, exploring the city’s vibrant energy and peaceful charm. Begin with a brief stop at Zojoji Temple, offering a stunning view of Tokyo Tower and featuring hundreds of Jizo statues, protectors of children. Continue to the iconic Shibuya Crossing, followed by a visit to the Meiji Shrine, dedicated to Emperor Meiji and Empress Shoken. Travel along the stylish Omotesando Avenue, admire the Imperial Palace gardens and Nijubashi Bridge, and pass through Akihabara, Tokyo’s hub for anime and electronics, and Kokugikan Sumo Arena. Conclude the tour at the historic Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant before returning to the hotel. In the evening, meet your guide at 6:30 p.m. and travel by metro to explore Shinjuku’s dynamic nightlife, followed by dinner at a local restaurant. Return to the hotel by metro, accompanied by your guide.

After breakfast, we’ll journey through beautiful mountain landscapes toward Mount Fuji. Our first stop is Kawaguchiko, known for its scenic lake and charming town. At Arakurayama Sengen Park, enjoy iconic views of Mount Fuji and visit the peaceful Fuji Sengen Shrine, surrounded by ancient trees. Later, we’ll take a serene 30-minute boat ride on Lake Kawaguchiko. After lunch, ascend to the Fifth Station of Mount Fuji, offering stunning views. In the evening, return to Kawaguchiko to check into a traditional Ryokan. Relax in the onsen before enjoying a delightful Japanese dinner.

We begin our day at 08:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kawaguchiko, passing the beautiful Kawaguchi and Saiko Lakes. By 09:00 a.m., we arrive at Iyashi no Sato Nenba, a traditional mountain village rebuilt as an open-air museum after being destroyed by a typhoon in 1966. Here, you can explore restored thatched-roof houses now functioning as craft shops, eateries, and cultural exhibits. At 10:45 a.m., we reach Shiraito Falls, known for their stunning 20-meter cascades. After lunch, we visit the Toyota Museum at 03:15 p.m., then continue to Kyoto, arriving by 07:00 p.m.

Today, we’ll immerse ourselves in the rich cultural heritage of Kyoto, Japan’s imperial capital from 794 to 1868. Remarkably untouched during World War II, Kyoto has preserved its artistic treasures. Our journey begins in Arashiyama, where we’ll admire the scenic Togetsukyo Bridge and visit the revered Tenryuji Temple, followed by a peaceful walk through the enchanting bamboo forest. We’ll then explore Fushimi Inari Shrine, the Imperial Palace, and the stunning Golden Pavilion (Kinkakuji Temple). In the evening, we’ll transfer you to Gion, Kyoto’s traditional district. Enjoy free time here, with the return to the hotel on your own by taxi.

We begin our day at 7:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kyoto through Japan’s beautiful countryside, heading toward the historic village of Tsumago. Renowned for its charming traditional wooden houses, Tsumago is one of the country’s most picturesque spots. Upon arrival at 11:15 a.m., you’ll have free time to explore, and lunch will be provided at a local restaurant. At 1:30 p.m., we depart for Matsumoto, arriving around 2:45 p.m. to visit its impressive 16th-century “Crow Castle.” After enjoying some leisure time in this vibrant city, we’ll continue our journey at 5:15 p.m., reaching Nagano by 6:30 p.m.

We begin our day at 7:30 a.m. with a scenic drive from Kyoto through Japan’s beautiful countryside, heading toward the historic village of Tsumago. Renowned for its charming traditional wooden houses, Tsumago is one of the country’s most picturesque spots. Upon arrival at 11:15 a.m., you’ll have free time to explore, and lunch will be provided at a local restaurant. At 1:30 p.m., we depart for Matsumoto, arriving around 2:45 p.m. to visit its impressive 16th-century “Crow Castle.” After enjoying some leisure time in this vibrant city, we’ll continue our journey at 5:15 p.m., reaching Nagano by 6:30 p.m.

Today’s journey takes us through the breathtaking Japanese Alps, offering awe-inspiring mountain landscapes. We begin in Nagano with a visit to the revered Zenkoji Temple, where guests can take part in the sacred Gomakuyo ceremony for good luck. At 10:30 a.m., we depart for the scenic Monkey Park, arriving at 11:30 a.m. for a forest walk among rivers and hot springs inhabited by bathing Japanese monkeys. After lunch, we continue at 1:45 p.m. through high-altitude terrain to Kusatsu, a spa town known for its onsen. By 7:15 p.m., we arrive in Ikaho for a Ryokan stay and traditional Japanese dinner.

We begin our day with a 7:45 a.m. departure from Ikaho Onsen, heading to the culturally rich town of Nikko, arriving around 10:00 a.m. Here, we’ll explore the splendid Nikko Toshogu Shrine, famed for its intricate architecture, followed by the acoustically unique Hall of the Crying Dragon. We’ll also visit the serene Taiyuinbyo Mausoleum, surrounded by tranquil forest. A peaceful walk along the Kanmangafuchi Abyss offers views of the river and hundreds of Jizo statues. Enjoy some free time for lunch and exploration of the city center before departing at 3:30 p.m. and arriving in Tokyo by 6:30 p.m.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Tanzanian safari unfolds like a dream come true: begin at Lake Manyara National Park, where graceful giraffes browse acacia canopies while the legendary tree-climbing lions survey their kingdom and flamingos paint the lake pink. Next, venture into the vast Serengeti National Park for pulse-racing game drives across sun-soaked plains, where you may witness the epic sweep of the Great Migration in all its untamed glory. Then, descend into the Ngorongoro Crater—an ancient volcanic amphitheater teeming with elephants, rhinos, and prides of lions against a backdrop of rolling grasslands and forested hills. Finally, pause in charming Arusha to stroll bustling markets, sample local coffee, and toast to the memories you’ve made before Travelxploria whisks you back to reality—your heart forever stamped with the wild beauty of Tanzania.

As you arrive at Kilimanjaro International Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our friendly Travelxploria representative. With a genuine smile and a wealth of local knowledge, they will provide you with a short yet insightful briefing about your journey ahead. Relax as you embark on a scenic drive to Arusha, where rolling landscapes and glimpses of Mount Meru set the perfect tone for your adventure. Upon arrival at your hotel, our representative will ensure a smooth check-in, allowing you to unwind and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay.

Enjoy views of local villages and the Great Rift Valley en route to Lake Manyara National Park, where lush forests and rich wildlife await. This comfortable drive is often the beginning of an unforgettable northern Tanzania safari adventure.

After breakfast before setting off on a journey to the iconic Serengeti. En route, pass through the breathtaking Ngorongoro Conservation Area and visit the historic Olduvai Gorge, where ancient fossils provide a glimpse into early human history. Arrive at your lodge or camp in time for lunch, followed by an afternoon game drive, exploring the vast landscapes until sunset. As evening falls, return for a delicious dinner and an overnight stay.

Spend a full day immersed in the wonders of Serengeti National Park, with both morning and afternoon game drives offering incredible opportunities to witness wildlife in their natural habitat. As Tanzania’s most famous and largest national park, Serengeti shares its borders with Kenya’s Masai Mara, forming a vast ecosystem teeming with life. The park is renowned for the Great Migration, where over a million wildebeest and thousands of zebras embark on their epic journey across the plains, defying droughts, predators, and treacherous river crossings. Explore the diverse landscapes, from rolling grasslands to acacia-dotted savannas, before unwinding with dinner and an overnight stay.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your lodge or camp before setting off with a picnic lunch towards the breathtaking Ngorongoro Conservation Area. Upon arrival, descend into the crater, a natural wonder teeming with diverse wildlife, from roaming elephants and powerful lions to the elusive black rhino. The rich landscapes and stunning scenery make for an unforgettable afternoon game drive. As the sun sets, ascend from the crater and continue to Karatu, where you will check in at your lodge or camp. Unwind with a delicious dinner and a restful overnight stay.

After a hearty breakfast, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with your departure. Enjoy a comfortable drive back to Arusha, taking in the final glimpses of Tanzania’s breathtaking landscapes. packages.package_name: Savannah to Sea: Masai Mara & Zanzibar Luxury Tour
packages.overview:
With Travelxploria, embark on a journey that seamlessly blends safari adventure with coastal serenity. Begin with a tranquil escape to Lake Naivasha, where a scenic drive leads to lush lakeside beauty and optional excursions that offer a gentle introduction to Kenya’s heartland. Then, head into the majestic Masai Mara, where golden savannahs come alive with prowling lions, elusive leopards, and—if the season is right—the awe-inspiring Great Migration, as millions of wildebeest brave predator-laden rivers. Thrilling sunrise and sunset game drives immerse you in Africa’s wild heartbeat, while an optional hot air balloon safari offers a bird’s-eye view of this incredible landscape bathed in golden light.

After the pulse of the wild, retreat to the tropical paradise of Zanzibar. Relax on powder-white sands under swaying palms, with turquoise waves at your doorstep. Discover the island’s rich heritage on an exotic spice tour, breathing in the fragrances of clove, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Wander through the UNESCO-listed streets of Stone Town, where history whispers from every carved door and bustling market. Set sail to pristine sandbanks for a sun-drenched escape in crystal-clear waters, and toast the day aboard a traditional dhow as the sun melts into the Indian Ocean. With Travelxploria, every moment is thoughtfully crafted to awaken your spirit and soothe your soul.

The reserve, an extension of the Serengeti, boasts endless rolling plains teeming with diverse wildlife, from majestic lions to herds of grazing antelope. Experience the thrill of spotting the Big Five in their natural habitat. For a truly magical perspective, opt for a mesmerizing hot air balloon safari at an additional cost, offering a bird’s-eye view of the sprawling savannah. Enjoy all meals & overnight stay at your lodge or camp.

packages.package_name: Wild Encounters: From Samburu to the Mara
packages.overview:
• Samburu National Reserve – Scenic drive through lush tea plantations to the rugged, semi-arid wilderness teeming with rare wildlife species.
  • Samburu Safari – Thrilling morning and afternoon game drives to spot the iconic reticulated giraffe, Grevy’s zebra, and Somali ostrich.
  • Ol Pejeta Conservancy – Immersive safari experience featuring white rhinos, lions, and a visit to the inspiring chimpanzee sanctuary.
  • Lake Nakuru National Park – Picturesque landscapes, vibrant flamingos, and incredible wildlife encounters, including endangered rhinos.
  • Masai Mara Safari – Iconic African adventure with golden savannahs, breathtaking wildlife sightings, and exhilarating game drives.
  • Masai Mara Game Drives – Dawn and dusk safaris to witness the circle of life in one of the world’s most spectacular ecosystems.

After breakfast, set off on a scenic drive north of Nairobi, passing through the lush, green landscapes of central Kenya, where vast tea and coffee plantations stretch across rolling hills. As you journey into the semi-arid wilderness of Samburu National Reserve, the scenery gradually transforms into rugged terrain dotted with acacia trees. Arriving in time for lunch, take a moment to relax before heading out for an afternoon game drive. Keep an eye out for the unique wildlife of the region, including the reticulated giraffe, gerenuk, Grevy’s zebra, Beisa oryx, and Somali ostrich. Return in the evening for dinner and an overnight stay.

Spend the entire day exploring the stunning semi-arid landscapes of Samburu National Reserve with morning and afternoon game drives. Traverse the vast plains and riverine forests in search of iconic wildlife, including elephants, big cats, and the unique species found only in this region. A visit to Buffalo Springs offers an opportunity to learn about the origins of its name and witness its natural beauty. In between game drives, relax and take in the breathtaking surroundings. Enjoy delicious meals and unwind at your lodge, soaking in the tranquility of the African wilderness.

Arrive in time for a delicious lunch at your camp, followed by an exciting afternoon game drive. You will also have the unique opportunity to visit the chimpanzee sanctuary, offering a glimpse into the lives of these incredible primates. As the day winds down, return to your camp for a delightful dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

Start your day with a warm cup of tea or coffee at the reception area before setting off on an exhilarating early morning game drive. The cool morning air creates the perfect conditions for wildlife sightings, as predators are still active and grazers roam the plains in search of food. Witness the golden sunrise over the savannah as you track the Big Five and other remarkable creatures. Return to your lodge or camp for a hearty breakfast and some leisure time. After lunch, venture out again for an afternoon game drive, soaking in the beauty of the wilderness until sunset. Conclude the day with a delightful dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, depart from the lodge and embark on a scenic drive through the beautiful landscapes of Kenya. Arriving in Nairobi by afternoon, you will be transferred to the airport, where our representative will assist with the final arrangements for your departure.

packages.package_name: Thrilling Safari Tour of Masai Mara
packages.overview:
Kiambethu Tea Farm – Stroll through lush tea plantations, sip freshly brewed tea, and immerse yourself in rich colonial history.
Masai Market – Wander through a colorful marketplace, discovering exquisite handcrafted souvenirs and traditional Kenyan artistry.
Aberdares Wilderness – Escape to a serene mountain paradise, where dense forests and hidden waterfalls shelter elusive wildlife.
Lake Nakuru Safari – Witness a mesmerizing pink-hued lake, home to vibrant flamingos and majestic rhinos roaming freely.
Masai Mara Game Drives – Experience thrilling encounters with the Big Five in the world-famous African savannah.
Sunrise Safari – Capture golden dawn hues while spotting prowling lions and graceful giraffes at their most active hour.
Balloon Safari – Soar above the Masai Mara at sunrise, taking in breathtaking panoramic views of the vast, untamed landscape.
Cultural Masai Village Visit – Engage with the legendary Masai warriors and learn about their unique customs and traditions.

As you arrive at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless start to your Kenyan adventure. With a friendly smile and expert guidance, they will assist you with your luggage and escort you to your private transfer. As you drive through the vibrant streets of Nairobi, your representative will share insights about the city, setting the tone for an unforgettable journey. Upon arrival at your carefully selected hotel, you’ll check in and unwind, preparing for the incredible experiences ahead. Enjoy a restful night.

After breakfast, set off on a scenic drive to Limuru for a visit to the lush Kiambethu Tea Farm, where you’ll learn about the tea-making process and enjoy the serene surroundings. After a delightful lunch, immerse yourself in local culture with a visit to a Masai market in Nairobi, where vibrant crafts, jewelry, and souvenirs showcase Kenya’s rich heritage. Stroll through the bustling stalls, interact with local artisans, and perhaps take home a unique keepsake. As the day winds down, return to your hotel for a relaxing evening and overnight stay.

Set out on an early morning game drive, the best time for wildlife sightings as the cool temperatures keep the animals active. Witness the graceful predators on the hunt, herds of elephants, and an array of other wildlife in their natural habitat. Return to the lodge or camp for a delightful buffet breakfast, followed by a relaxing mid-morning at your leisure. After a sumptuous lunch, embark on another thrilling afternoon game drive, exploring more of the breathtaking Masai Mara until sunset. As the day winds down, return to your lodge or camp for dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Maasai Mara ","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, set out on a full-day game drive, immersing yourself in the breathtaking landscapes and abundant wildlife of the Masai Mara. Enjoy a picnic lunch in the heart of the reserve, surrounded by nature's wonders. For an unforgettable experience, opt for a hot air balloon safari at sunrise, offering a bird’s-eye view of the vast plains and roaming wildlife. Later, you may choose to visit a traditional Maasai village, gaining insight into their rich culture and way of life. As the sun sets, return to your lodge or camp for dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As the sun rises over the Masai Mara, marking the end of your incredible safari adventure, our Travelxploria representative will be there to ensure a smooth departure. After an early breakfast, embark on a scenic drive back to Nairobi, cherishing the last glimpses of the stunning landscapes and wildlife along the way. Arriving in the afternoon, enjoy a brief moment to relax before being transferred to the airport for your international flight towards home.

packages.overview:
Lake Manyara National Park – Witness the mesmerizing tree-climbing lions and explore the park’s lush landscapes on an afternoon game drive.
Serengeti National Park – Experience the breathtaking golden plains and encounter the legendary wildlife, including the spectacular Great Migration.
Olduvai Gorge – Step into history at this world-renowned archaeological site where ancient fossils tell the story of early human life.
Ngorongoro Crater – Descend into Africa’s Eden, a wildlife-rich volcanic caldera offering unparalleled game viewing in a surreal setting.
Mto wa Mbu Village – Immerse in vibrant local culture with a brief but enriching visit to this diverse and lively Tanzanian village.

Spend an entire day exploring the breathtaking Serengeti plains on thrilling game drives, immersing yourself in the heart of Tanzania’s most renowned national park. As the largest protected area in the country, spanning an impressive 14,763 square kilometers, Serengeti shares its borders with Kenya’s iconic Masai Mara. The park is best known for the awe-inspiring Great Migration, where over a million wildebeest and thousands of zebras move in search of fresh grazing, following the rhythm of the seasonal rains. Witness this spectacular display of nature and encounter diverse wildlife before returning to your camp or lodge for a well-deserved meal and rest.

Enjoy a hearty breakfast at the lodge before setting off on a scenic drive to Ngorongoro, carrying a packed picnic lunch for the journey. Upon arrival, descend into the breathtaking Ngorongoro Crater, a UNESCO World Heritage Site teeming with diverse wildlife. Spend the afternoon on an unforgettable game drive, spotting lions, elephants, rhinos, and an array of other animals thriving in this natural wonder. As the sun begins to set, ascend to the crater rim and settle into your accommodation for a relaxing evening, a delicious dinner, and an overnight stay surrounded by the beauty of the highlands.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.
