Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

to Vienna","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European adventure in the vibrant British capital.

  • Explore iconic sights by land and water, topped with stunning views.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with panoramic skyline vistas.

  • Meet lifelike wax figures of global celebrities and icons.

  • Travel seamlessly to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • See Parisian highlights and ascend the Eiffel Tower.

  • Admire masterpieces in one of the world’s greatest art museums.

  • Journey to Belgium’s charming capital city.

  • Explore Grand Place, Atomium, and historic architecture.

  • Enjoy a scenic rail journey to the Dutch capital.

  • Discover Amsterdam’s charm from its streets and waterways.

  • Visit fairy-tale villages and traditional windmills.

  • Conclude your journey with unforgettable European memories.

city tour, river cruise and London Eye.","day_summary":"

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Begin your day by visiting one of London’s most iconic landmarks—Tower Bridge. Walk along its glass-floored high-level walkways and marvel at the panoramic views of the River Thames and surrounding cityscape. Learn about the bridge’s fascinating history through interactive exhibits in the Tower Bridge Exhibition. Afterward, head to The Shard, Western Europe’s tallest building, and take a high-speed elevator to the viewing platform. From the top, enjoy breathtaking 360-degree views of London’s skyline, including sights like St. Paul’s Cathedral, the London Eye, and the Tower of London. This experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and stunning cityscapes.

Experience the glamour and excitement of Madame Tussauds London with your pre-booked entrance ticket, granting you seamless access to one of the world’s most iconic wax museums. Get up close with incredibly lifelike figures of global celebrities, world leaders, sports legends, and historical icons. Walk the red carpet alongside Hollywood stars, meet the British Royal Family, and strike a pose with your favorite pop stars. Don’t miss the immersive experiences like the Marvel Super Heroes 4D cinema and the Spirit of London ride. It’s a fun, interactive attraction that promises unforgettable moments and fantastic photo opportunities for all ages.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. packages.package_name: Baltic Delight Capitals Coastlines and Culture
packages.overview:
Tallinn, Estonia – A Fairytale Capital

  • Wander through Tallinn’s Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site with cobblestone streets and medieval towers.

  • Visit Toompea Castle and enjoy panoramic views from the Kohtuotsa Viewing Platform.

  • Explore the Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, an architectural gem with Russian Orthodox influences.

  • Stroll along the lively Town Hall Square, lined with charming cafes and shops.

2. Riga, Latvia – Art Nouveau & Culture

  • Marvel at the stunning Art Nouveau architecture in the city center.

  • Discover the historic Riga Old Town, home to the House of the Blackheads and St. Peter’s Church.

  • Visit the bustling Central Market, one of Europe’s largest food markets.

  • Walk along the Daugava River Promenade for scenic views and relaxation.

3. Vilnius, Lithuania – A Blend of Cultures

  • Explore the Gothic and Baroque architecture in Vilnius Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site.

  • Visit the Gediminas Tower, offering breathtaking views of the city.

  • Discover the Uzupis District, a bohemian enclave known for its artistic vibe.

  • Experience the spiritual atmosphere at the Gates of Dawn, a historic religious site.

4. Helsinki, Finland – The Nordic Gem

  • Visit the stunning Helsinki Cathedral, a neoclassical landmark.

  • Explore the vibrant Market Square, famous for its local delicacies.

  • Take a ferry to the Suomenlinna Fortress, a UNESCO-listed sea fortress.

  • Experience modern Nordic design at the Oodi Library and Temppeliaukio Church (Rock Church).

5. Warsaw, Poland – A Historic Capital

  • Walk through the beautifully reconstructed Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site.

  • Visit the Royal Castle and the Lazienki Park, home to the famous Chopin Monument.

  • Learn about Polish history at the Warsaw Uprising Museum.

  • Stroll along Krakowskie Przedmieście, one of Warsaw’s most elegant streets.

​Today we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this beautiful capital city, built on 14 interconnected islands. We’ll visit Gamla Stan, also known as the “the city between bridges”, the lively old quarter filled with monumental buildings such as the Nobel Prize Museum, located right beside the main square of Stortorget which honors Nobel Prize winners, the Cathedral, and the Royal Palace. Whenever possible, we’ll enjoy the stunning views from the Fjällgatan viewpoint. Afterwards, you’ll have leisure time to explore. We recommend visiting the museums and parks. Optionally, you can visit the City Hall and the Vasa Museum.


​

As we arrive in Finland, we recommend heading to the ship’s deck for sunrise to enjoy the mesmerizing landscapes as we sail past the Åland Islands, a collection of hundreds of forested islands. After disembarking the ferry, you’ll have time to explore Turku, a city with a strong Swedish influence. We’ll then continue our journey to the neighboring city of Naantali, a picturesque town with charming wooden houses by the sea. Our travels will take us to Helsinki, where we’ll arrive around lunchtime. In the afternoon, you’ll have leisure time to explore the city, including its old market, Russian-influenced buildings, and beautiful churches.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Vilnius ","to":"Warsaw","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":676,"h_name":"NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT","h_country":"Poland","h_city":"Warsaw","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207837-IMG_20210905_074940_edited.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207938-2020-11-07.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207946-unnamed (39).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Warsaw city tour ","day_summary":"

We’ll start the day with a panoramic tour of Warsaw with a local guide. Home to nearly two million people, this political and economic hub of Poland boasts a blend of modern architecture and meticulously restored historic buildings. We’ll stroll through the charming old town, featuring many old buildings, the Royal Palace, and cobbled streets, all restored after their destruction in World War II and now declared a World Heritage Site. We’ll visit the Palace of Culture, a skyscraper gifted by the Soviet Union, reflect on the history of what was once the largest Jewish ghetto in Europe, and wander through Lazienki Park, home to the Chopin Monument.


You’ll have free time in the afternoon to visit museums, such as the National Museum and the Warsaw Rising Museum, or to explore the lively city center filled with shops and activities.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Gdansk","country":"Poland","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Going to Gdansk ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll depart for northern Poland. Our first stop will be Olsztynek, where we’ll visit the open-air Museum of Folk Architecture (admission included). Here, you can admire wooden houses, old mills, and a traditional church, making it feel like you’ve stepped back in time! We’ll then continue to the Elblag Canal, the longest navigable canal in Poland, where we’ll visit a museum located in an area where boats are hauled over land on rails to navigate elevation changes. Next, we’ll head to Malbork to visit its impressive castle (admission included, green route), one of the largest medieval castles in Europe, built in the 13th century by the Teutonic Order and now a UNESCO World Heritage Site. We’ll arrive in Gdansk—formerly known as Danzig—in the evening. The historic center is stunning and lively, and we highly recommend an evening stroll to experience its vibrant atmosphere.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Warsaw","to":"Gdansk","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":795,"h_name":"Novotel Gdańsk Centrum","h_country":"Poland","h_city":"Gdansk","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326488-2024-12-23.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326637-unnamed - 2025-03-10T124945.908.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326642-2024-07-01 (7).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Sopot","country":"Poland","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Setting off for Sopot ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll join our guide for a visit to the European Solidarity Centre, a striking contemporary building that commemorates the history of the Solidarity movement, which played a pivotal role in the fall of the Soviet Union. Highlights include the monument dedicated to the fallen workers. Next, we’ll include admission to the Museum of the Second World War. This impressive museum, opened in 2017, serves as a powerful reminder of the 3 to 6 million people who lost their lives in Poland during that tragic conflict. Afterward, we’ll have some time to explore the historic center before heading to Sopot, a charming seaside resort on the Baltic Sea. Known for its vibrant atmosphere, Sopot features a long sandy beach and one of Europe’s longest wooden piers, offering stunning views of the sea. In the evening, we’ll board a modern ferry (cruise-style) for our journey to Sweden. The scheduled departure is at 07:30 p.m., with overnight accommodations in cabins. Breakfast will be included

Stockholm, the capital of Sweden, is a beautiful city spread across 14 islands connected by bridges, blending historic charm with modern innovation. The medieval Old Town, Gamla Stan, features narrow cobblestone streets, colorful buildings, and landmarks like the Royal Palace. The city is renowned for its museums, including the Vasa Museum, ABBA Museum, and Skansen, as well as its vibrant art scene with metro stations known as underground galleries. Stockholm boasts a strong focus on sustainability, clean urban planning, and a rich café culture centered around the Swedish tradition of fika. Each district offers its own vibe, from the trendy streets of Södermalm to the upscale elegance of Östermalm. Surrounded by the Stockholm archipelago, the city also provides stunning natural escapes just a boat ride away. With friendly English-speaking locals, excellent public transport, and a peaceful atmosphere, Stockholm is an ideal destination for culture, nature, and design lovers alike.

packages.package_name: A Grand Journey Through Northern Europe Stockholm to Gdansk
packages.overview:
• Stockholm, Sweden – The Venice of the North

  • Copenhagen, Denmark – A Fairytale City

    • Discover the Gamla Stan (Old Town) with its medieval charm and colorful buildings.

    • Visit the Royal Palace and witness the changing of the guard.

    • Explore the Vasa Museum, home to a remarkably preserved 17th-century warship.

    • Enjoy a scenic boat ride through the Stockholm Archipelago.

  • Berlin, Germany – A City of History & Modernity

    • Stroll along Nyhavn, a picturesque waterfront lined with vibrant buildings and cozy cafés.

    • Visit the famous Little Mermaid Statue and explore Tivoli Gardens, one of the world’s oldest amusement parks.

    • Discover the Rosenborg Castle, home to Denmark’s crown jewels.

    • Experience the bicycle-friendly culture of this dynamic city.

  • Gdansk, Poland – A Baltic Treasure

    • Wander through the beautifully restored Long Market (Dlugi Targ) and admire the colorful facades.

    • Visit the Neptune Fountain and the imposing St. Mary’s Church, one of the largest brick churches in the world.

    • Learn about World War II history at the Museum of the Second World War.

    • Experience the lively waterfront at Motlawa River Embankment, lined with charming cafes and historic buildings.

    • Walk through the iconic Brandenburg Gate and the historic Reichstag Building.

    • Reflect at the Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe and visit the Berlin Wall Memorial.

    • Explore the vibrant districts of Kreuzberg and Mitte, filled with art, culture, and nightlife.

    • Discover Museum Island, a UNESCO World Heritage site housing world-class museums.

We’ll then stop for lunch in the charming lakeside town of Augustów. Afterward, we’ll head to central Poland, arriving in Warsaw by the end of the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Vilnius ","to":"Warsaw","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":676,"h_name":"NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT","h_country":"Poland","h_city":"Warsaw","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207837-IMG_20210905_074940_edited.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207938-2020-11-07.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Warsaw/NOVOTEL WARSZAWA AIRPORT/1741095207946-unnamed (39).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Warsaw Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll start the day with a panoramic tour of Warsaw with a local guide. Home to nearly two million people, this political and economic hub of Poland boasts a blend of modern architecture and meticulously restored historic buildings. We’ll stroll through the charming old town, featuring many old buildings, the Royal Palace, and cobbled streets, all restored after their destruction in World War II and now declared a World Heritage Site. We’ll visit the Palace of Culture, a skyscraper gifted by the Soviet Union, reflect on the history of what was once the largest Jewish ghetto in Europe, and wander through Lazienki Park, home to the Chopin Monument.


You’ll have free time in the afternoon to visit museums, such as the National Museum and the Warsaw Rising Museum, or to explore the lively city center filled with shops and activities.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Gdansk","country":"Poland","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Warsaw to Gdansk","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll depart for northern Poland. Our first stop will be Olsztynek, where we’ll visit the open-air Museum of Folk Architecture (admission included). Here, you can admire wooden houses, old mills, and a traditional church, making it feel like you’ve stepped back in time! We’ll then continue to the Elblag Canal, the longest navigable canal in Poland, where we’ll visit a museum located in an area where boats are hauled over land on rails to navigate elevation changes. Next, we’ll head to Malbork to visit its impressive castle (admission included, green route), one of the largest medieval castles in Europe, built in the 13th century by the Teutonic Order and now a UNESCO World Heritage Site. We’ll arrive in Gdansk—formerly known as Danzig—in the evening. The historic center is stunning and lively, and we highly recommend an evening stroll to experience its vibrant atmosphere.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Warsaw","to":"Gdansk","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":795,"h_name":"Novotel Gdańsk Centrum","h_country":"Poland","h_city":"Gdansk","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326488-2024-12-23.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326637-unnamed - 2025-03-10T124945.908.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Gdansk/Novotel Gdańsk Centrum/1741591326642-2024-07-01 (7).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Sopot","country":"Poland","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Sopot Day Tour & Nynäshamn Ferry at Evening to Proceed Towards Stockholm","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll join our guide for a visit to the European Solidarity Centre, a striking contemporary building that commemorates the history of the Solidarity movement, which played a pivotal role in the fall of the Soviet Union. Highlights include the monument dedicated to the fallen workers. Next, we’ll include admission to the Museum of the Second World War. This impressive museum, opened in 2017, serves as a powerful reminder of the 3 to 6 million people who lost their lives in Poland during that tragic conflict. Afterward, we’ll have some time to explore the historic center before heading to Sopot, a charming seaside resort on the Baltic Sea. Known for its vibrant atmosphere, Sopot features a long sandy beach and one of Europe’s longest wooden piers, offering stunning views of the sea. In the evening, we’ll board a modern ferry (cruise-style) for our journey to Sweden. The scheduled departure is at 07:30 p.m., with overnight accommodations in cabins. Breakfast will be included.

After a pleasant journey, our ferry will arrive in Karlskrona in southern Sweden around 06:30 a.m. We’ll continue to Stockholm, with a stop in Västervik, a charming seaside town with a picturesque historic center. In the afternoon, we’ll arrive in Stockholm, the capital of Sweden, a beautiful city spread across fourteen islands in the Baltic Sea archipelago, connected by numerous bridges and ferries. Stockholm is renowned for its rich history, stunning architecture, and its blend of modernity and tradition. The afternoon is yours to enjoy. We recommend taking a stroll through the historic center and visiting its museums and parks.Our journey will come to an end, leaving you with wonderful and lasting memories.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Join your Travelxploria representative and expert tour guide for an incredible journey through Germany’s historic Heidelberg, the enchanting Black Forest, and Switzerland’s breathtaking Rhine Falls. Start your day exploring Heidelberg Altstadt, a picturesque old town nestled along the Neckar River, with its medieval charm and the iconic Heidelberg Castle towering above. Stroll through cobblestone streets and visit the stunning Church of the Holy Spirit. Next, venture into the heart of the Black Forest, where you’ll be captivated by its lush landscapes and charming villages. Experience a live demonstration of traditional cuckoo clock craftsmanship, a true Black Forest specialty. Later, travel to Schaffhausen to witness the mighty Rhine Falls, Europe’s largest waterfall, where cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. After a day of exploration, unwind at your hotel in Central Switzerland. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Overnight stay with Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner.

A Majestic Alpine Experience Enjoy the tour’s crowning jewel with Travelxploria the best travel agency as we take you on an enchanting alpine adventure to Jungfraujoch, \"The Top of Europe,\" paired with the breathtaking beauty of Interlaken. After a delightful breakfast, journey to Interlaken, a picturesque Swiss town nestled between two stunning lakes, offering spectacular mountain views. Accompanied by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide, embark on an unforgettable ride aboard the Eiger Express and cogwheel train to Jungfraujoch, Europe’s highest railway station. Witness the awe-inspiring Aletsch Glacier, explore the Ice Palace, and admire panoramic views from the Sphinx Observatory. After a delicious lunch, return to Central Switzerland for overnight stay, followed by a sumptuous dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" A Swiss Dream: Soaring Heights & Timeless Charm ","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a thrilling alpine adventure to Mt. Titlis. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, enjoy the journey to the world’s first rotating cable car, Rotair, offering mesmerizing 360-degree views of snow-covered peaks and deep glacial crevasses. Conquer the exhilarating Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge, before indulging in a delightful lunch. Afterward, enjoy a guided exploration of Lucerne’s iconic landmarks, including the Lion Monument and Kapellbrücke. Take some free time for shopping, then savor a delicious dinner at your hotel in Central Switzerland, completing a day filled with adventure, culture, and stunning landscapes.

After a delicious breakfast, join your Travelxploria representative and guide for an unforgettable day trip to Rome. Begin with a visit to Vatican City, the world’s smallest country, and explore the Vatican Museums, home to classical sculptures and Renaissance masterpieces. Marvel at the Sistine Chapel’s \"Last Judgment\" by Michelangelo and visit St. Peter’s Basilica, a true architectural marvel. Afterward, enjoy an orientation tour of Rome, taking in the Colosseum, the iconic Trevi Fountain, and other renowned landmarks. Enjoy a delightful lunch in the heart of Rome before continuing your tour. End the day with a hearty dinner before heading back to your hotel. With Travelxploria, experience Italy at its finest.

From the scenic views to the cultural explorations, you'll carry these cherished memories home. We hope to see you again soon for your next adventure with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

packages.package_name: Fairy Tale Journey Through France, Britain & the Netherlands
packages.overview:
Travelxploria's Ultimate European Journey: Explore Iconic Landmarks Across the Continent

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as we guide you through the heart of Europe’s most iconic cities, where history, culture, and breathtaking beauty await at every turn. Begin your journey in Paris, where the stunning Eiffel Tower offers panoramic views of the city, and the world-renowned Louvre Museum houses masterpieces like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo. As you wander the historic streets, marvel at the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and stroll along the Champs-Élysées, reaching the imposing Arc de Triomphe.

Next, discover the captivating city of London, where landmarks like Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament dominate the skyline. Explore the ancient halls of the Tower of London, and don’t miss the spectacular view from the London Eye, offering a new perspective on this vibrant city. Venture north to Edinburgh, where Edinburgh Castle sits proudly atop the city’s skyline, and hike up Arthur’s Seat for breathtaking panoramic views of Scotland’s capital.

In Glasgow, enjoy the peaceful tranquility of the Botanic Gardens and discover the fascinating exhibits at the Kelvingrove Art Gallery & Museum. Then, travel to Dublin, where you can explore the historic Trinity College and gaze upon the Book of Kells, an illuminated manuscript that has survived for centuries. While in Ireland, make sure to enjoy a pint at the Guinness Storehouse, where the legacy of Ireland’s famous beer comes to life.

As your journey continues, visit the charming Amsterdam, where a scenic Canal Cruise offers a picturesque way to view the city’s most iconic landmarks, including the Rijksmuseum and the Van Gogh Museum.

Lastly, for music lovers, head to Liverpool, where you can pay tribute to The Beatles at the Beatles Story and explore the city’s historic Royal Albert Dock. With Travelxploria, each destination is carefully curated to give you an immersive and unforgettable European experience.

packages.overview:
• Louvre Museum: Home to the world-renowned Mona Lisa and other masterpieces.
  • Notre-Dame Cathedral: Gothic cathedral, a masterpiece of architecture.
  • Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe: Iconic avenue and historical monument.
  • The largest ancient amphitheater, known for gladiatorial contests.
  • Visit St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel, home to Michelangelo’s famous ceiling.
  • An ancient temple turned church with stunning architecture.
  • Toss a coin into the famous Baroque fountain for good luck.
  • The museum where Anne Frank and her family hid during WWII.
  •  Explore Amsterdam’s picturesque canals.
  •  Scenic views and boat rides on the lake in Zurich
  • Explore the glittering world of Swarovski crystals.
  • Florence Cathedral Known for its stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.
  • Piazza della Signoria: A historic square with statues and fountains.

Upon arrival, collect your baggage and proceed outside, where you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary.

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Sweta © Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay.

ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara.

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Stroll through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air museum filled with stunning Renaissance sculptures, surrounded by historic cafés, and dominated by the majestic Palazzo Vecchio. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. overview:
Beyond Dreams: Explore the Extraordinary Under 2,50,000 with Travelxploria

Imagine a journey where the sun rises over vast golden savannahs, and by nightfall, you’re sipping fine wine beneath the twinkling lights of a centuries-old European city. Picture pristine islands where turquoise waves kiss powdery beaches, or wild landscapes where ancient mountains meet endless skies. With Travelxploria’s curated experiences under 2,50,000, the world’s most enchanting corners are no longer distant dreams but your next destination.

Travelxploria—your trusted Best Travel Agency and celebrated Best International Tour Operator—crafts journeys that weave together culture, comfort, and discovery. Every itinerary is a carefully designed story, inviting you to lose yourself in vibrant markets, historic alleys, breathtaking safaris, and serene island retreats. Whether it’s the thrill of witnessing Africa’s majestic wildlife up close, the charm of cobblestone streets echoing with history, or the soothing calm of tropical lagoons, each moment is infused with magic.

Our Best Tour Operator expertise ensures your trip blends luxury and authenticity, from boutique hotels nestled in heritage neighborhoods to exclusive beach villas surrounded by swaying palms. Each experience is curated to engage your senses and enrich your spirit, whether it’s a private sunset cruise, a guided art tour, or an intimate dinner under starlit skies.

For those embarking on new beginnings, our Best Honeymoon Planner creates escapes filled with romance and elegance—secluded beaches, cozy mountain hideaways, and unforgettable moments designed just for two. Families benefit from our Best Family Package options, combining adventure and relaxation so every generation finds joy—from wildlife safaris and cultural excursions to beachside fun and urban explorations.

Travelxploria’s commitment to quality means every detail is handled seamlessly—transfers, guides, and accommodations—so you can focus on what truly matters: soaking in the beauty, culture, and wonder of your journey.

With Travelxploria, traveling under 2,50,000 doesn’t mean sacrificing dreams—it means unlocking them. The world is waiting—beyond the horizon, beyond expectations, and perfectly within reach.
